ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" INTEGER /* Type of school (foreign key to school_types) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "school_size" INTEGER /* Size of the school (foreign key to school_sizes) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "enrollment_trend" TEXT /* Trend in student enrollment (e.g., Increasing, Decreasing, Stable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_size FOREIGN KEY ("school_size") REFERENCES school_sizes ("school_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the budget belongs to */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "spending_range" TEXT /* Spending range for the school (e.g., $585-630) */,
  "budget_year" INTEGER /* Year the budget is for */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding (e.g., State, Federal, Local) */,
  "special_programs_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for special programs (e.g., after-school programs, special education) */,
  "technology_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for technology */,
  "maintenance_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for maintenance */,
  "staff_salary_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for staff salaries */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the performance record belongs to */,
  "average_math_score" TEXT /* Average math score for the school */,
  "average_reading_score" TEXT /* Average reading score for the school */,
  "passing_math_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "passing_reading_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "overall_passing_rate" TEXT /* Overall percentage of students passing */,
  "performance_year" INTEGER /* Year the performance metrics are for */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level (e.g., Grades 6-8, Grades 9-12) */,
  "students_with_disabilities_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students with disabilities */,
  "english_learners_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of English learners */,
  "low_income_students_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of low-income students */,
  "graduation_rate" TEXT /* Graduation rate */,
  "dropout_rate" TEXT /* Dropout rate */,
  "attendance_rate" TEXT /* Attendance rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type (e.g., District, Charter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_sizes" (
  "school_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school size */,
  "school_size_name" TEXT /* Name of the school size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_size_id")
)
column_names: Type of school (foreign key to school_types)
Total number of students in the school
